eyebrow.zh: Skill 装前先验真 · 被改过就拒
eyebrow.en: Verify a Skill before it loads · refuse what's been touched

headline.zh:
Agent 装 Skill 前
先确认它没被偷偷改过
headline.en:
Before your agent loads a Skill
make sure nobody tampered with it

sub.zh: 你的 Coding Agent 会按 star 数自动安装 Skill 和 MCP server，但没人真读过那些代码。attestload 在加载前核对每一份产物是不是它声称的那个：被篡改或没签名，一律拒绝运行。
sub.en: Your coding agent auto-installs Skills and MCP servers by star count, but nobody reads that code. attestload checks every artifact before it loads — is it really what it claims to be? If it's been tampered or isn't signed, it gets refused.

title.zh: 信任从 star 数变成事实
title.en: Trust stops being a star count

body.zh: 挑 Skill 的依据基本只有 star 数，而自主 agent 会跳过人工审阅直接自动安装——这正是供应链攻击的入口。attestload 把每一份产物的信任换成一次密码学核对：是谁建的、从哪个版本来、加载前有没有被改过，一次说清。
body.en: Picking a Skill comes down to star count, and your agent auto-installs it without anyone reading the code — the perfect entry for a supply-chain attack. attestload turns that trust into a single cryptographic check: who built it, which version it came from, and whether it's been touched before load.

chips: › 不再靠 star 数赌信任
› 谁建的 · 哪个版本 · 有没有被改

title.zh: 签名后塞进去的文件，加载前就抓到
title.en: A file slipped in after signing gets caught before load

body.zh: 有人在一个看起来靠谱的 Skill 里偷偷多塞一个文件、改一行代码，光看目录看不出来。attestload 加载前把整份内容重新核对一遍：多一个文件、少一个字节都对不上，直接拒绝运行。
body.en: Someone slips an extra file or changes one line inside a Skill that looks legit — invisible to the eye. attestload re-checks the whole thing before load: one extra file or one changed byte won't match, and it gets refused.

title.zh: 还没签名的，先靠一份已验过的名单兜底
title.en: What isn't signed yet is covered by a pre-verified list

body.zh: 让全世界每个 Skill 都先签名要时间。在那之前，attestload 带一份已验过的热门 Skill 名单当兜底，命中就放行；你也能钉死自己信任的版本，别的版本一律拒。
body.en: Getting every Skill on earth signed first takes time. Until then, attestload ships with a pre-verified list of popular Skills as a floor — hit it and it passes; you can also pin the exact version you trust and refuse anything else.

chips: › 热门 Skill 名单兜底

title.zh: 每次提交前自动把关，不用记得去查
title.en: Checked on every commit — you don't have to remember

body.zh: 靠人记得「装前先验」不现实。attestload 往你的仓库装一个提交前的钩子，每次提交自动核对，有人动了手脚提交就被挡下——本地运行，无需自建服务。
body.en: Relying on people to 'check before install' doesn't scale. attestload drops a pre-commit hook in your repo that re-checks every commit automatically — if anyone touched something, the commit gets blocked. It runs locally, with no service of your own to stand up.

chips: › 本地运行 · 无需自建服务

headline.zh: 让 agent 加载前先过这一关
headline.en: Make your agent pass this gate before it loads anything

sub.zh: MIT 许可，一行命令装好：冷启动有名单兜底，每次提交自动把关，被改过或没签名的代码加载前一律挡下。
sub.en: MIT-licensed, one line to install: the cold start is covered by a verified list, every commit is checked, and anything tampered or unsigned is blocked before load.

tag.zh: Skill 装进 Agent 前的那道关卡
tag.en: The gate a Skill passes before your agent loads it
